position: First element of the response Status-Line
explanation: Three-digit numeric code in the response start-line that classifies the outcome (informational, success, redirection, client error, server error) and is used to distinguish response types.

position: HTTP/2 pseudo-header field in the response header block
explanation: Protocol-specific pseudo-header carrying the numeric status code for responses in HTTP/2; semantically equivalent to the HTTP/1.x Status-Code and used to distinguish response types.
